description_long: This is an irregularly shaped stone with a predominantly white base, interspersed with dark gray to black mineral veins and rusty brown stains. The surface is rough and uneven, with jagged edges and a natural, unpolished appearance. The stone displays a mix of crystalline and opaque textures, suggesting a composition of quartz or similar minerals. Some areas are marked by prominent dark streaks, while others show subtle translucency and earthy discoloration. The overall form is asymmetrical, with no flat faces, making it appear as a naturally weathered fragment. Its coloration and texture evoke the look of a stone commonly found in urban landscaping or as a natural obstacle in parks.
description: An irregular, rough white stone with dark mineral veins and rusty brown stains, featuring a jagged, natural texture. The surface is unpolished and asymmetrical, with visible crystalline and earthy patterns.
description_view_0: This view highlights the stone's white base with prominent black and brown mineral streaks running diagonally across the surface.
description_view_1: This angle shows a more translucent white area with concentrated rusty brown discoloration and fewer dark veins.
description_view_2: The stone appears broader and flatter here, with a mix of white and brown hues and subtle dark patches along the edge.
description_view_3: This side emphasizes the dense black veining and mottled white surface, with some yellow-brown staining along the edge.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or natural obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular veining and mottling with dark mineral streaks and rusty patches, creating a natural, chaotic pattern.
attribute_weathering: Rough and unpolished with visible mineral stains, indicating moderate natural weathering and exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with manicured lawns or paved surfaces but blends with other natural stones or earthy landscaping elements.
